exploration_notes: Integration test file written to /workspace/integration/evaluation_integration_test.go. The tests cover the full HTTP stack: gRPC server with production interceptors (ErrorUnaryInterceptor, ValidationUnaryInterceptor, EvaluationUnaryInterceptor) → gRPC-gateway HTTP handler → httptest.Server. A mock store implementing evaluation.Storer provides controlled test data. 10 test functions cover: boolean evaluation success/disabled, variant evaluation with matching rules and distributions, flag-not-fou
